title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Indifi Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Indifi Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Indifi Technologies family as a Backend Developer in Ghaziabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Indifi Technologies:
Indifi Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Node.js

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Indifi Technologies!
